pr.title: test(bdd): assert OpenHands context summary absent from agent prompts
pr.body:
## Summary

- Adds a failing BDD feature (`openhands_context_isolation.feature`) that documents the contract: nue agent system prompts must not contain OpenHands-specific branding
- 4 scenarios, all currently **failing**, confirming the gap exists
- Failure messages point directly to the fix location: `_apply_server_agent_overrides` in `live_status_app_conversation_service.py`

## What the tests check

The default SDK `system_prompt.j2` (rendered when `system_prompt_filename` is not overridden for non-planning agents) currently contains:

| Phrase | Why it must be absent |
|--------|----------------------|
| `"You are OpenHands agent"` | OpenHands identity claim |
| `"AGENTS.md"` | OpenHands memory mechanism |
| `"openhands@all-hands.dev"` | OpenHands commit identity |
| `"docs.openhands.dev"` | OpenHands documentation link |

## Root cause

`_apply_server_agent_overrides` only sets `system_prompt_filename` for `AgentType.PLAN` agents. Non-planning agents fall through to the SDK default (`system_prompt.j2`), which carries all of the above content.

## Fix (not in this PR)

Override `system_prompt_filename` in the `else` branch of `_apply_server_agent_overrides` to point to a nue-specific template.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
pr.author: GusCayresMindsight
